title: Hocraft-Sv
description: A server-friendly, performance-optimized modpack combining Create automation, Dungeons Arise adventure, and Mekanism tech for a rich multiplayer experience.
body:
---

# Modpack Description

This modpack was designed with **multiplayer servers** in mind — perfect for hosting a server with friends and exploring a wide range of content together! It includes a carefully curated mix of mods such as **Create**, **Mekanism**, **Cataclysm**, **TACZ**, **Vampirism**, **Deeper and Darker**, and **Ad Astra**, offering everything from automation and tech to magic, dungeons, and interdimensional and space exploration.

Optimized for **server-side play**, this modpack enhances the multiplayer experience with complex systems and challenging content. While it's focused on server gameplay, it can also be played in single-player; however, certain mods may be missing dependencies when used on the client-side.

---

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT: CLIENT VERSION AVAILABLE

If you're looking to **play this modpack on your own (client-side)**, make sure to use the **correct version for clients**:

🎮 👉 [**Download Client Version Here**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hocraft)

> The server version may **not work properly** on single-player or client installations, as it is designed specifically for hosting.

---

## Features

This modpack includes a variety of exciting mods that enhance different aspects of gameplay, focusing on automation, challenging bosses, expanded dimensions, and server optimization. Here’s a breakdown of some key features:

* **Create and Mekanism**: Advanced automation and energy systems.
* **Cataclysm**: Epic boss fights and high-stakes challenges.
* **Deeper and Darker**: New dimensions with hidden secrets.
* **Ad Astra**: Space and interdimensional exploration.
* **TACZ**: New technologies and in-depth mechanics.
* **Vampirism**: Vampire gameplay and abilities.

### Performance Mods

* **FerriteCore** – Memory optimization
* **Modern Fix** – Improved performance and compatibility
* **Leaves Be Gone** – Faster leaf decay
* **Ksyxis** – Better chunk loading and performance

---

## Server Specifications

Tested on:

* **CPU**: Intel(R) Core(TM) i3-5005U @ 2.00GHz
* **RAM**: 6GB
* **Player Capacity**: Up to 3 players
* **View Distance**: 5

---
